intended_use: Rapid is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including but not limited to physicians (medical analysis and decision making) and medical technicians (administrativ
intended_use_full: Rapid is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including but not limited to physicians (medical analysis and decision making) and medical technicians (administrative case processing). The software runs on a standard off-the-shelf computer or a virtual platform, such as VMware, and can be used to perform image viewing, processing, and analysis of images. Data and images are acquired through DICOM compliant imaging devices. Rapid is indicated for use in Adults only.
target_condition: acute stroke with known occlusion of intracranial internal carotid artery or proximal middle cerebral artery; selection of candidates for endovascular thrombectomy
ground_truth: Phantom models for performance validation; software design requirements and specifications for verification/validation testing
other_metrics: Phantom validation testing demonstrated accurate representation of key processing parameters (CBF, CBV, MTT, Tmax) under clinically relevant conditions; small expected biases in MTT and Tmax noted between conventional CT and C-arm CT scanners due to temporal resolution differences
